title: Resolution No. 6 of 2021 Regarding Settlement of Disputes Related to Domain Name Registration
summary: Establishes the process for settlement of disputes connected with domain name registration under Bahrain’s domain registry framework.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.internet_: Domain-name dispute resolution regulation for Bahrain domains.

notes: Related instruments: Related to .bh and البحرين domain-name registration framework
